He speaks to Bloomberg's Romaine Bostick at the Mizuho Technology Conference in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 沒有芯片可以在沒有 Synopsys 的情況下設計，首席執行官表示
articles.summary_zh: Synopsys 首席執行官 Sassine Ghazi 談論人工智能的增長，它如何整合去年收購的工程軟件公司 Ansys，他表示目前沒有芯片可以在沒有 Synopsys 的情況下設計。他在 Bloomberg 的 Romaine Bostick 面前發言。

articles.title: Expectations From Apple’s Big AI, Siri Launch
articles.summary: Carolina Milanesi, Creative Strategies president and principal analyst, joins Ed Ludlow in Cupertino, California to discuss what happens next after Apple rolls out an overhauled version of the Siri digital assistant, and the importance of having the AI embedded into the consumer's devices. She joins on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 蘋果大型 AI、Siri 推出的期望
articles.summary_zh: Creative Strategies 總裁兼首席分析師 Carolina Milanesi 與 Ed Ludlow 在加州庫比蒂諾討論蘋果推出改革版 Siri 數字助手後的後續動作，以及將 AI 嵌入消費者設備的重要性。

articles.title: Roblox Shares Rise on Report Russia May Unblock Gaming Platform
articles.summary: Roblox Corp. shares jumped after a report Russian government agencies proposed lifting restrictions on the company’s gaming platform, though any final decision rests with law enforcement authorities.
articles.title_zh: Roblox 股票因報道俄羅斯可能解除遊戲平台限制而上漲
articles.summary_zh: 報道稱俄羅斯政府機構提議解除對 Roblox Corp. 遊戲平台的限制後，其股票上漲，儘管任何最終決定仍由執法部門決定。

articles.title: Crusoe Touts 5 Gigawatts of Data Centers, Pauses Wyoming Site
articles.summary: Crusoe, a developer of data centers for companies like OpenAI and Microsoft Corp., said it has contracts for almost 5 gigawatts of capacity, even though it has paused work on a significant project in Wyoming.
articles.title_zh: Crusoe 推崇 5 吉瓦數據中心，暫停懷俄明州項目
articles.summary_zh: 為 OpenAI 和 Microsoft Corp. 等公司開發數據中心的 Crusoe 表示擁有近 5 吉瓦容量的合同，儘管暫停了在懷俄明州的一個重大項目。

articles.title: Oura Ring 5 is 40% Smaller and Has New Health Features
articles.summary: Oura Ring 5 is here, 40% smaller — closer to the size of a wedding band — and has some brand new health features. Mark Gurman explores how the Oura Ring has evolved, generation by generation (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Oura Ring 5 尺寸縮小 40%，具有新的健康功能
articles.summary_zh: Oura Ring 5 問世，尺寸縮小了 40%（更接近結婚戒指的大小），並具有一些全新的健康功能。Mark Gurman 探討了 Oura Ring 一代代的進化過程。（來源：Bloomberg）

articles.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI Can Rewrite History for Megacap IPOs
articles.summary: The history of megacap initial public offerings shows that the stocks usually slump in the first year of trading. But upcoming listings from SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI are big enough and systemically important enough to the market that those analogies may not apply.
articles.title_zh: SpaceX、Anthropic、OpenAI 可以為超大型 IPO 改寫歷史
articles.summary_zh: 超大型首次公開募股的歷史表明，這些股票通常在交易第一年下跌。但來自 SpaceX、Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的即將推出的上市規模足夠龐大，對市場具有系統重要性，使得這些類比可能不適用。

articles.title: Apple Expands Child Safety Tools as Social Media Bans Grow
articles.summary: Apple Inc. is expanding tools for parents to protect children online, a move that comes as governments around the world are increasingly banning social media for young people.
articles.title_zh: 蘋果在社交媒體禁令擴大之際擴展兒童安全工具
articles.summary_zh: Apple Inc. 正在擴展家長保護兒童在線的工具，此舉正值世界各地政府越來越多地禁止年輕人使用社交媒體之際。

articles.title: Taiwan Eyes Curbs on AI Chip Sales to China to Align With US
articles.summary: Taiwan authorities are considering much stricter export controls on AI chip sales to China to further align with US measures, according to people familiar with the matter, an effort to address semiconductor smuggling that risks drawing a rebuke from Beijing.
articles.title_zh: 台灣考慮限制向中國銷售 AI 芯片以與美國保持一致
articles.summary_zh: 根據知情人士透露，台灣當局正在考慮對向中國銷售 AI 芯片採取更為嚴格的出口管制，以進一步與美國措施保持一致，此舉旨在解決可能招致北京批評的半導體走私問題。

articles.title: Europe’s Space Race Gains Pace With Iceye’s Jump to €10 Billion Valuation
articles.summary: Finnish satellite-intelligence company is one in an ecosystem of space-based industries that’s emerging in Europe
articles.title_zh: 歐洲太空競賽隨著 Iceye 升至 10 億歐元估值而加快步伐
articles.summary_zh: 芬蘭衛星情報公司是歐洲新興太空產業生態系統中的一員。

articles.title: Clip Partners With Ant on Consumer Payments Wallet in Mexico
articles.summary: Mexican payments company Clip is launching a digital wallet as it pushes to bring millions of consumers and small businesses into the country’s formal financial system.
articles.title_zh: Clip 與 Ant 合作在墨西哥推出消費者支付錢包
articles.summary_zh: 墨西哥支付公司 Clip 正在推出數字錢包，旨在幫助數百萬消費者和小企業進入該國的正規金融體系。

articles.title: Banks Sell Out After Broadband Firms’ Land Grab Backfires
articles.summary: Banks with exposure to heavily-indebted broadband providers are selling their loans to distressed debt funds at a discount, a sign of their increasing weariness with the cash-strapped sector.
articles.title_zh: 寬帶公司土地收購失利後銀行拋售貸款
articles.summary_zh: 對負債累累的寬帶運營商有敞口的銀行正在折扣價將其貸款出售給困境債務基金，這是他們對現金短缺行業日益厭倦的跡象。

articles.title: Klarna Launches US Savings Accounts to Attract Everyday Users
articles.summary: Klarna Group Plc is launching savings accounts in the US as the digital lender looks to deepen its core banking business and attract more everyday users.
articles.title_zh: Klarna 在美國推出儲蓄賬戶以吸引日常用戶
articles.summary_zh: 數字貸款公司 Klarna Group Plc 正在美國推出儲蓄賬戶，以加深其核心銀行業務並吸引更多日常用戶。

articles.title: Ad Agencies Are a Buying Opportunity in AI Era, Berenberg Says
articles.summary: Investor jitters about the potential disruption caused by artificial-intelligence adoption has created a broad-based buying opportunity for the shares of European advertising agencies, according to Berenberg analysts.
articles.title_zh: 廣告公司在 AI 時代是買入機會，Berenberg 表示
articles.summary_zh: 根據 Berenberg 分析師的說法，投資者對人工智能採納可能造成的破壞的擔憂已經為歐洲廣告公司股票創造了廣泛的買入機會。

articles.title: Japan Inc.’s Shake-Up Sparks Flashbacks to Dot.com Boom and Bust
articles.summary: The rise to the top by AI-related companies has parallels to an earlier bubble
articles.title_zh: 日本公司的改組引發對網路泡沫繁榮與衰退的回憶
articles.summary_zh: 與AI相關公司的崛起與早期泡沫時期存在相似之處。

articles.title: Standard Bots Raises $200 Million to Manufacture Robots in US
articles.summary: Standard Bots has raised $200 million in a new round of funding to ramp up manufacturing of robotic arms in the US as the country vies to keep pace with China in building more advanced robots.
articles.title_zh: Standard Bots籌集2億美元在美國製造機器人
articles.summary_zh: Standard Bots籌集2億美元新一輪融資，以擴大美國機械臂製造規模，幫助美國在與中國的先進機器人競賽中保持步伐。

articles.title: AI Rivals Race to Market, Intesa Exclusive | The Pulse 6/9/2026
articles.summary: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops. Today's guests: Carlo Messina, Intesa Sanpaolo CEO; Angel Ubide, Citadel Head of Economic Research for Global Fixed Income & Macro; Steve Wise, Carlyle Co-Head of Americas Corporate Private Equity; Lawrence Freedman, King's College London War Studies Emeritus Professor (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI競爭對手競相上市，Intesa獨家報導 | The Pulse 6/9/2026
articles.summary_zh: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua"以全球商業、經濟、金融和政治中心的深度對話著稱，總部設在倫敦，提供獨家採訪和市場重大新聞。

articles.title: China Preps $295 Billion Plan to Fund AI Buildout
articles.summary: China is planning to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years to build data centers across the country. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 中國準備2,950億美元計劃資助AI建設
articles.summary_zh: 中國計劃在未來五年投入約2兆元人民幣（2,950億美元）在全國建設數據中心。

articles.title: China Preps $295 Billion Plan to Fund Nationwide AI Buildout
articles.summary: China is preparing to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years on building data centers across the country, fueling Beijing’s ambition to propel the domestic AI sector and surpass the US in a potentially game-changing technology.
articles.title_zh: 中國準備2,950億美元計劃資助全國AI建設
articles.summary_zh: 中國準備在未來五年投入約2兆元人民幣（2,950億美元）建設全國數據中心，以推動國內AI發展並在此潛在改變遊戲規則的技術上超越美國。

articles.title: Robots May Help Defuse US-China Tensions
articles.summary: The two countries have vital tech for the coming wave of robots
articles.title_zh: 機器人可能有助於緩解美中緊張關係
articles.summary_zh: 兩國在機器人浪潮中擁有關鍵技術。

articles.title: AI Earnings Durability Is in Focus for BlackRock’s Wei Li
articles.summary: Wei Li, chief global investment strategist at BlackRock, says there is a “healthy debate to be had” about the durability of Artificial Intelligence earnings and sees the AI trade as a “space to be selective and active.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 貝萊德Wei Li聚焦AI收益持久性
articles.summary_zh: 貝萊德全球首席投資策略師Wei Li表示，對人工智慧收益持久性有必要進行「健康辯論」，並將AI交易視為「需要選擇性和主動性參與的領域」。

articles.title: Anthropic Calls Mythos Dangerous. Why Is It Expanding Access?
articles.summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant initially released Mythos to a small group of carefully chosen parties because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic稱Mythos危險。為什麼還要擴大訪問權限？
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic PBC表示其新AI工具Mythos在發現軟體和電腦系統漏洞方面表現卓越，因此無法向公眾發布，初期僅提供給精選小組使用。

articles.title: Uber-Backed Wayve Eyes Stake Sale on the UK’s New Private Market
articles.summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd., the UK-based autonomous driving software startup, is considering letting investors sell shares through the country’s new private securities market, according to people familiar with the matter, in what would be the first major endorsement of the novel system.
articles.title_zh: Uber支持的Wayve考慮在英國新私募市場出售股份
articles.summary_zh: 英國自主駕駛軟體新創公司Wayve Technologies Ltd.考慮讓投資者在該國新的私募證券市場上出售股份，這將成為該新型系統的首次重大認可。

articles.title: US military claims first drone boat rescue of downed helicopter crew
articles.summary: A drone boat picked up two US Army pilots from waters near the Strait of Hormuz after their helicopter gunship went down, US military officials said in interviews with various broadcast news outlets. The incident apparently represents the first time the US military has used a drone for such a rescue mission at sea. The two crew members from the US Army AH-64 Apache were “rescued by American forces” at 7:33 pm US Eastern Time after their helicopter went down off the coast of Oman on June 8, according to a US Central Command press release . That press release mentioned support from US Navy units including the US 5th Fleet’s Task Force 59 , which is charged with integrating uncrewed aerial, surface, and underwater vehicles, alongside AI, into 5th Fleet maritime operations. Anonymous US milita
articles.title_zh: 美軍聲稱首次用無人機船救援直升機墜毀機組人員
articles.summary_zh: 在一架美國陸軍直升機砲艦在霍爾木茲海峽附近墜毀後，無人機船從海中救起兩名美國陸軍飛行員。

articles.title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single errant character
articles.summary: Researchers have analyzed a high-severity vulnerability in Linux that’s able to escalate untrusted users to root by exploiting a bug you don't often see: a single errant character inside the kernel. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-23111 , is located in nf_tables, a subsystem of the Linux kernel that provides packet filtering capabilities. It’s used to manage firewall rules and replaces older subsystems such as iptables, ip6tables, arptables, and ebtables. !!!WTF!!! The presence of a single mis-issued exclamation point in code implementing nf_tables introduced a use-after-free, a class of vulnerability that corrupts memory by placing malicious code at memory addresses that haven’t been properly freed of their previous contents. CVE-2026-23111 can be exploited by an unprivileged user
articles.title_zh: Linux高危漏洞由單一字符錯誤引起
articles.summary_zh: 研究人員分析了Linux高危漏洞CVE-2026-23111，該漏洞由內核中單一錯誤字符引起，可將未受信任的用戶提升為root權限。

articles.title: Gold isn’t inert, it just has bodyguards protecting it
articles.summary: Gold is weird. It's one of the few metals that doesn’t really oxidize. Even silver and copper—from the same column of the periodic table—form weak oxides. Naively, you might expect that gold would tarnish just like silver. Gold also sits right next to platinum, but it has none of that metal’s catalytic properties. Then came gold nanoparticles that acted like catalysts, and we were confused by their apparent willingness to take part in chemical reactions. Now, a pair of scientists has explained that gold’s inertness isn’t inherent to the atom but rather to the surfaces that gold crystals form. Before we get to the results, let’s first take a look at the traditional explanation for gold’s inertness and why an inert material that has no catalytic activity suddenly acts as a catalyst when in i
articles.title_zh: 黃金並非惰性，它只是有保鏢保護
articles.summary_zh: 黃金是獨特的金屬，不易氧化，與同族的銀和銅形成較弱氧化物的情況不同。

articles.title: Here's Audi's next Q7 SUV and US-only SQ7, now with an RS V8
articles.summary: Audi provided flights from Washington, DC, to Munich, Germany, and accommodation so Ars could see the Q7, as well as the Q9. We also drove the new RS5. Ars does not accept paid editorial content. MUNICH, GERMANY—Audi is having a bit of an SUV renaissance lately. Over the past 18 months, it has brought out a new electric Q6 and replaced the midsize Q5 , and later this summer we'll get to see the Q9 , a full-size leviathan with the Escalade in its sights. But today it's the turn of an all-new version of the Q7, and the North America-only SQ7, both of which go on sale later this year for model year 2027. The standard Q7 will come to the US with a twin-turbo 2.9 L V6 that generates 429 hp (320 kW) and 442 lb-ft (600 Nm). Meanwhile, the SQ7 borrows the 591 hp (441 kW), 590 lb-ft (800 Nm) V8 as
articles.title_zh: 奧迪下一代Q7 SUV和美國限定SQ7，現搭載RS V8
articles.summary_zh: 奧迪為Ars提供從華盛頓特區飛往德國慕尼黑的航班和住宿，以展示Q7、Q9和新款RS5車型。

articles.title: Apple says its AI is still private, even when it's running on Google's servers
articles.summary: CUPERTINO, California—Apple announced earlier this year that its long-delayed Siri upgrade, announced this week as "Siri AI," would use Google's Gemini language models . What the company confirmed at its Worldwide Developers Conference yesterday was that it also ran on Nvidia hardware installed in Google servers. But the company is still making the same privacy promises it did before, when all of its AI models were either running locally on your devices or on Apple-controlled server hardware. For years, Apple has touted user privacy as a key benefit of using its platforms. Its cloud services use encryption that's intended to keep other people—including Apple employees—from being able to gain access to it. And the company has long advertised its use of on-device processing for things like s
articles.title_zh: 蘋果表示其AI在Google服務器上運行時仍保持隱私
articles.summary_zh: 蘋果在全球開發者大會上確認其Siri升級「Siri AI」使用Google Gemini語言模型，並在Google安裝的Nvidia硬體上運行。

articles.title: First Drive: The 2027 Rivian R2 entirely changes the EV game
articles.summary: Rivian provided flights from Los Angeles to Salt Lake City, Utah, and accommodation so Ars could drive the R2. Ars does not accept paid editorial content. This month, Rivian begins customer deliveries of the highly anticipated R2 model that aims to bring the startup’s aspirational adventure lifestyle to the mainstream EV market. That has required cutting costs, scaling production, and reaching new customers—a big brief, then, for the diminutive R2. To show exactly how a startup transitions to a mass-market automaker, Rivian hosted a picturesque media event in Utah that included both on and off-road driving in the Launch Edition that stickers for just under $60,000 (including destination). We also got plenty of access to the technological development that underpins the brand’s critical elec
articles.title_zh: 首試駕：2027 Rivian R2徹底改變電動車遊戲
articles.summary_zh: Rivian為Ars提供從洛杉磯飛往猶他州鹽湖城的航班和住宿，本月Rivian開始交付備受期待的R2車型，旨在實現其冒險生活方式願景。

articles.title: 臺灣FHIR聯測松開跑，瞄準4大主題涵蓋TW Core、癌藥事審、SMART App到跨國病歷交換
articles.summary: 為驗證醫療資訊系統的實際互通能力，臺灣FHIR聯測松（TW Connectathon 2026）昨日（6/8）登場，共吸引47家機構、52支團隊參與，包括14家醫療機構、6家學研法人單位及27家業者。今年聯測主題涵蓋TW Core FHIR能力驗證、癌症用藥事前審查、SMART on FHIR應用程式授權機制，以及國際病人摘要（IPS）等4大賽道，從FHIR格式驗證，進一步邁向跨國資料交換驗證。接下來，聯測要強化特定領域應用，如電子處方箋、次世代基因定序。
articles.title_zh: 臺灣FHIR聯測松開跑，瞄準4大主題涵蓋TW Core、癌藥事審、SMART App到跨國病歷交換
articles.summary_zh: 為驗證醫療資訊系統的實際互通能力，臺灣FHIR聯測松（TW Connectathon 2026）昨日（6/8）登場，共吸引47家機構、52支團隊參與，包括14家醫療機構、6家學研法人單位及27家業者。今年聯測主題涵蓋TW Core FHIR能力驗證、癌症用藥事前審查、SMART on FHIR應用程式授權機制，以及國際病人摘要（IPS）等4大賽道，從FHIR格式驗證，進一步邁向跨國資料交換驗證。接下來，聯測要強化特定領域應用，如電子處方箋、次世代基因定序。

articles.title: 針對研究人員揭露Deep Security Agent防護功能暫時失效問題，趨勢科技表示重新載入機制屬既有設計，無須修補
articles.summary: 上週Linux版Deep Security Agent（DSA）傳出存在可能導致防護功能暫時失效的問題，趨勢科技今天發布正式回應，他們強調相關行為屬於產品既有設計，並非安全漏洞，不需要緊急修補。
articles.title_zh: 針對研究人員揭露Deep Security Agent防護功能暫時失效問題，趨勢科技表示重新載入機制屬既有設計，無須修補
articles.summary_zh: 上週Linux版Deep Security Agent（DSA）傳出存在可能導致防護功能暫時失效的問題，趨勢科技今天發布正式回應，他們強調相關行為屬於產品既有設計，並非安全漏洞，不需要緊急修補。

articles.title: 數發部發表公務AI人才培育指引，導入雙軌認證與人才履歷機制
articles.summary:
為加速政府公部門的AI轉型，數發部推動公務AI人才培育制度化，提出「AI公務人才認定指引」Beta版，將公務體系人才分為政策規畫、應用、開發三大類，並建立職能架構、標準課綱、雙軌認證及人才履歷制度，還串聯AWS、Google、微軟等民間認證資源，加速培養公部門具有AI素養與實務能力的公務人才，助政府提升行政效能與對民服務品質。
這次公布的指引以Beta版方式先試行6個月，數發部將與人事行政總處合作，根據第一線公務機關人員的意見滾動修正。
數發部與行政院人事行政總處去年7月共同成立的AI人才辦公室，近期公布公務AI人才培育架構與發展指引，希望透過跨部會整合、人才培訓及產官合作機制，來建立政府的AI人才生態系，加速各機關導入AI技術應用。
articles.title_zh: 數發部發表公務AI人才培育指引，導入雙軌認證與人才履歷機制
articles.summary_zh:
為加速政府公部門的AI轉型，數發部推動公務AI人才培育制度化，提出「AI公務人才認定指引」Beta版，將公務體系人才分為政策規畫、應用、開發三大類，並建立職能架構、標準課綱、雙軌認證及人才履歷制度，還串聯AWS、Google、微軟等民間認證資源，加速培養公部門具有AI素養與實務能力的公務人才，助政府提升行政效能與對民服務品質。
這次公布的指引以Beta版方式先試行6個月，數發部將與人事行政總處合作，根據第一線公務機關人員的意見滾動修正。
數發部與行政院人事行政總處去年7月共同成立的AI人才辦公室，近期公布公務AI人才培育架構與發展指引，希望透過跨部會整合、人才培訓及產官合作機制，來建立政府的AI人才生態系，加速各機關導入AI技術應用。

articles.title: Google更新NotebookLM，新增代理式研究與多格式輸出
articles.summary: Google升級AI筆記本NotebookLM，將原本以資料整理與來源問答為主的工具，擴充為可協助研究、分析與產出檔案的代理式研究。新版NotebookLM改用Gemini 3.5，並在Antigravity上運作，替每個筆記本配置安全雲端運算環境，使系統可在使用者的研究脈絡中撰寫及執行程式碼，用於資料處理、分析與複雜文件理解。

articles.summary: 關聯式資料庫MariaDB近日發布資安公告，修補開源社群版（Community Server）與商用企業版（Enterprise Server）的多項漏洞，包含CVSS嚴重性評分滿分10.0分的重大漏洞，建議用戶盡速更新至已修補版本。

articles.title: 池安量子資安推PQ-SDN安全無線通訊模組，結合PQC與MANET技術建構無人載具高韌性網路
articles.summary:
無人機應用日益蓬勃發展，如何在複雜環境維持網路通訊穩定並確保資安防護，已成為產業關注焦點。致力於後量子密碼學（PQC）的池安量子資安（Chelpis），於Computex 2026首度公開展示其最新打造的無人機解決方案「安全無線通訊模組PQ-SDN」，不僅具備PQC演算法，也標榜強大的抗干擾特性與Mesh網路架構支援。
現場人員指出，PQ-SDN的核心特色之一，是導入池安量子資安設計的演算法函式庫實作，這項技術近期通過美國國家標準暨技術研究院（NIST）CAVP驗證。PQ-SDN透過與PQ-IC晶片安全（Silicon Security）技術整合，從底層硬體建立對抗量子運算解密威脅的防禦韌性，預計今年年前，會將PQC技術正式實作進PQ-SDN模組。

articles.title: 殭屍網路C0XMO利用老舊DD-WRT漏洞，擴散並感染DVR與Android等裝置
articles.summary: 資安業者Fortinet旗下的威脅研究與情報團隊FortiGuard Labs上週披露，Gafgyt殭屍網路的最新變種C0XMO正在利用DD-WRT開源路由器韌體於2021年揭露的CVE-2021-27137漏洞，在攻陷未更新的路由器後，再藉由獨立的Python掃描模組進一步感染數位錄影機（DVR）、網路影音管理平臺及Android裝置等多種裝置。

articles.title: 惡意Chrome擴充套件鎖定AI平臺互動內容，收集對話與敏感資料
articles.summary: 隨著使用者與生成式AI的互動逐漸成為企業工作流程的一部分，攻擊者也開始將AI對話內容視為新的資料來源。 近期出現主動監控用戶與AI平臺互動內容的惡意或可疑Chrome擴充套件，藉此收集使用者輸入的對話紀錄與敏感資訊。

articles.title: Ubiquiti UniFi管理平臺軟體存在重大漏洞鏈，可讓攻擊者免帳密取得root權限
articles.summary: 資安業者Bishop Fox揭露，網通設備業者Ubiquiti的UniFi管理平臺軟體UniFi OS Server存在一組重大漏洞鏈，攻擊者只要能連到管理介面，可能不需帳號密碼就能繞過驗證對系統下達指令，最終取得root權限。研究人員已在UniFi OS Server 5.0.6測試環境驗證完整攻擊鏈，並確認5.0.8已修補相關問題。
